cases.prompt: Walk me through how this authentication module works.

assertions.text: Traces the code from entry point to behavior
Produces a structured walkthrough covering entry points, data flow, key invariants, and where to make changes
Cites file and line numbers so the user can follow along
Builds a mental model of purpose, inputs/outputs, control flow, and side effects
Explains in layers, starting high level then drilling into the non-obvious parts
